title: Banking and Financial Institutions (Enhancement of Capital Adequacy for Banks) Order, 2012
title_en: Banking and Financial Institutions (Enhancement of Capital Adequacy for Banks) Order, 2012

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Banking and Financial Institutions (Enhancement of Capital Adequacy for Banks) Order, 2012 and shall come into operation on the date of publication in the Gazette .

provisions.title: Capital require­ments for banks
provisions.content: Every bank shall commence operations with and maintain at all times, a minimum of core capital of not less than fifteen billion shillings.

provisions.title: Grace period
provisions.content: (1) An existing bank which has a core capital of less than the amount prescribed in paragraph 2 of this Order shall increase its core capital within a period of three years. (1) Any bank to which paragraph 3(1) applies shall, within a period of three months of the effective date, submit to the Bank of Tanzania for approval, action plans that shall enable the bank concerned to comply with the provisions of this Order.
